name: google-antigravity-codex
description: Independent Codex plugin and MCP tools for Google Antigravity OAuth, chat, grounded search, writing, release drafting, image generation, model routing, and quota status.

interface.shortDescription: Use Google Antigravity directly from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Google Antigravity Codex provides an independent Codex plugin plus MCP stdio server for Antigravity OAuth, chat, native Google Search grounding with evidence, writing, release drafting, image generation, model listing, model routing, retry diagnostics, and quota status. It includes Codex-facing skills for coding, code review, model routing, doctor checks, image generation, grounded search, writing, and releases.
defaultPrompt: Use Google-grounded search for this current fact.
Draft release notes from the current repo.
Generate an image through Google Antigravity.
Route this task to the best Antigravity model.
Review this code with Antigravity as a second reviewer.
Run an Antigravity plugin doctor check.
